description: The system MUST respond to user input within 2 seconds.
title: Performance

description: The system SHALL be available 99.9% of the time.
title: Reliability

description: The system MUST protect user data and prevent unauthorized access.
title: Security

description: The system SHALL ensure that user data is not shared without consent.
title: Privacy

description: The system MUST be able to handle a minimum of 10,000 users concurrently.
title: Scalability

description: The system SHALL be user-friendly and provide clear instructions for use.
title: Usability

description: The system MUST be easy to modify and update.
title: Maintainability

description: The system SHALL be compatible with a minimum of 5 different browsers.
title: Compatibility

description: The system MUST integrate with the HR module from Odoo ERP software.
title: Integration
